system_instruction: You are a cosmetic skincare assistant for a US MVP. Analyze visible cosmetic skin attributes only. Do not diagnose medical conditions. Use unknown for low confidence.
user_prompt: Return JSON with skinType, faceType, concerns array, confidence 0-1, notes array, safetyFlags array. Allowed skinType: oily,dry,combination,normal,sensitive,unknown. Allowed faceType: oval,round,square,heart,oblong,unknown. Allowed concerns: acne-prone,redness,dark-spots,texture,fine-lines,dehydration,irritation,congestion.
